verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents agreed on Argentina) and terminated the process. This is the optimal behavior for a moderator.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly synthesized the unanimous agreement from the agents, noting the convergence on Argentina across all domains (Linguistic, Landscape, Regulatory, Meta). The reasoning followed the evidence hierarchy by acknowledging the strength of the regulatory and linguistic evidence.
